children.text: I am glad to be a reporter for Students' Voice to share my visit to First Hill Farm.
The farm has rich vegetation and the environment is quite peaceful.
children.cn: 这个农场植被茂盛，环境非常安静。
我很高兴能成为《学生之声》的记者，分享我参观第一山农场的经历。

children.text: We took part in various activities and had a memorable experience.
First, we explored the area to identify different types of plants.
children.cn: 首先，我们勘察了这个区域，以识别不同类型的植物。

children.text: Next, we spent time picking fresh fruits and vegetables in the tents.
children.cn: 接下来，我们在帐篷里花时间采摘新鲜的水果和蔬菜。

children.text: After that, we planted trees because we wanted to protect the land.
children.cn: 在那之后，我们种了树，因为我们想保护这片土地。
我们参加了各种各样的活动，并且有了一次难忘的经历。

children.text: Although the work was tiring, we realized that every grain comes from hard work.
children.highlight: Although, every grain comes from hard work

children.text: The visit inspired us to work hard and care more about nature.
children.cn: 这次参观激励我们努力学习，更加关心大自然。
虽然工作很累，但我们意识到每一粒粮食都来自辛勤的劳动。
